top_signals.title: Trump Says Deal With Iran Could Be Signed Within Days
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump says a deal to end the war with Iran could be signed within days. “We just made a great settlement of the war with Iran, and we’re going to be subject to finalization of documents, we should get done over the next few days,” Trump said. Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld report.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Reliability Crisis Utilities Don't Want to Talk About
top_signals.summary: What are the optics? AI centers are gobbling up power production, transmission space, and water. Transmission line expansion at a pitiable pace. A rush to build enough power plants. Forest fires burn lines and vice versa. The Trump administration plans to solve power shortages by cancelling windmill projects and subsidizing coal-fired power plants. (Why not quash the sales of electric vehicles by subsidizing horses? Just a question.) And, of course, in the meantime, pictures of utility executives at the EEI convention congratulating themselves…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
